--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Firbolg — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):9+1=10 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):9+1=10 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):5+1=6 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):10+1=11 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 4/5 targets affected.
